title: Missing property in the web interface of dbpedia
description:
I'm not sure if this is the right place to report this. Please inform me if I am.
Check the results of the query below here http://dbpedia.org/sparql
SELECT * WHERE{
  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Academic_Structure_of_the_Australian_National_University> ?p ?o
}

And check the results shown here http://dbpedia.org/page/Academic_structure_of_the_Australian_National_University
There are properties missing (rfd:type)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE academic_structure (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, type VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO academic_structure (id, name, type) VALUES (1, 'Australian National University', NULL);
SELECT * FROM academic_structure WHERE type IS NULL;
UPDATE academic_structure SET type = 'University' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT name, IFNULL(type, 'Unknown') AS type FROM academic_structure WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Missing properties in query results for specific resource
